scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n next,worker -c blue,green "npm run dev" "npm run dev:worker"
scripts.prebuild: npm run copy-wasm && npm run copy-ffmpeg && npm run build:worker
scripts.copy-wasm: mkdir -p public/wasm && find node_modules/@jsquash -name '*.wasm' -exec cp {} public/wasm/ \;
scripts.copy-ffmpeg: mkdir -p public/ffmpeg public/workers && cp node_modules/@ffmpeg/core/dist/esm/ffmpeg-core.js public/ffmpeg/ffmpeg-core.js && cp node_modules/@ffmpeg/core/dist/esm/ffmpeg-core.wasm public/ffmpeg/ffmpeg-core.wasm && cp node_modules/@ffmpeg/ffmpeg/dist/esm/worker.js public/ffmpeg/worker.js && cp node_modules/@ffmpeg/ffmpeg/dist/esm/const.js public/ffmpeg/const.js && cp node_modules/@ffmpeg/ffmpeg/dist/esm/errors.js public/ffmpeg/errors.js && cp node_modules/@ffmpeg/ffmpeg/dist/esm/*.js public/workers/ && cp node_modules/@ffmpeg/core-mt/dist/esm/ffmpeg-core.js public/ffmpeg/ffmpeg-core.mt.js && cp node_modules/@ffmpeg/core-mt/dist/esm/ffmpeg-core.wasm public/ffmpeg/ffmpeg-core.mt.wasm && cp node_modules/@ffmpeg/core-mt/dist/esm/ffmpeg-core.worker.js public/ffmpeg/ffmpeg-worker.mt.js
scripts.postinstall: npm run copy-wasm && npm run copy-ffmpeg && npm run build:worker
